---
title: "About"
---


PhD Candidate in Epidemiology with experience in biostatistics, real-world evidence research, survival analysis, and healthcare data analytics.

Research interests include:
- Alzheimer's disease and related dementias
- Cancer epidemiology
- Clinical trial analytics
- Causal inference
- Healthcare quality improvement

Technical skills:
- R
- SAS
- Python
- SQL
- Survival analysis
- Propensity score methods
